channel.title: Portfolio on RaihnForge
channel.description: Recent content in Portfolio on RaihnForge

item.title: Production Design & Visual Systems
item.description:
Selected production design and visual systems work prepared for Lead Production Designer and Visual Systems & UX roles.

Covers live broadcast overlay systems (Back2Warcraft Coverlay, Team Liquid × HyperX, Team Liquid Dota 2, Victorious Gaming pick-phase redesign), tournament identity and event production (Grubby × PokerStrategy, Grubby vs Flash MLG Dallas, IdrA logo system, Back2Warcraft mark refresh), and in-game UX from co-produced indie titles (Mecromage map screen, foundational tile system, BaseTrade TV cheermote brand system).

item.title: Riot Games — Visual Systems & UX
item.description:
Selected work prepared for Riot Games — Visual Systems & UX.

A curated selection rather than a complete archive. The pieces are chosen to show one through-line: how visual systems create emotional and experiential cohesion across every player-facing surface. Live broadcast overlay systems engineered against in-game UI, self-serve template kits that hold brand voice without a designer in the loop, motion-graphic families designed once and scaled across an ecosystem, and worldbuilding craft that gives those systems something to be cohesive around.

item.title: Central Washington University
item.description:
A six-page curated portfolio prepared for Central Washington University’s visual communication review.

The selection focuses on public-facing work that demonstrates clear, branded, audience-focused visual communication across formats and touchpoints — including KW Fitness (independent brand system), Kelvin Education (educational video and social templates), CWU Vet Center (student outreach print materials), and selected esports and community design work.

The full portfolio is available as an online page and as a downloadable PDF.
